description: The Taliban is a Kenyan criminal organization based in Nairobi slums, founded around 2001 as an offshoot of the Baghdad Boys. They belong to the Luo tribe and are led by Joash Oluande. They are involved in providing security at bus stops and controlling public transport routes, often clashing with the rival Mungiki gang. The group has political ties to Raila Odinga's Orange Democratic Movement.
